Sumo Logic Academy

Sumo Logic Academy offers comprehensive training programs, to help our users grow their understanding and skills to maximize the value of their investment in the Sumo Logic SaaS Log Analytics Platform. Our courses are developed by our in-house Instructional Designers working in close collaboration with Sumo product teams to ensure subject matter expertise, optimal content quality, and delivery methods.

Sumo Logic Academy

Take advantage of free Instructor Led virtual classes and self-paced training! Dedicated, private options are also available for a white glove experience.

  • Self-Paced eLearning hosted in our learning portal – Complimentary
  • Instructor-Led Virtual – Complimentary
  • Instructor-Led Dedicated Virtual and Onsite
  • Sumo Logic Certified: Proctored certification exams and digital badge

All courses include hands-on labs in our dedicated training environment. These labs ensure the most interactive and engaging training possible for our users.

Sumo Logic Certified

As part of Sumo Logic Academy, the Sumo Logic Certified Program provides an opportunity for users to certify their skills and demonstrate thorough knowledge of their respective domain, providing a trusted credential showcasing confidence in their ability to use Sumo Logic capabilities in their daily professional roles to management and peers.

Participation

Whether you are a customer, partner, prospect or someone simply curious about Sumo Logic, all are welcome to participate in our training. A free trial account is all that is needed!

Sign up today

Instructor-Led virtual classes

Join fellow Sumo users in your region for free hands-on virtual instructions of our courses and workshops! Register for any class(es) of interest that work best for your schedule.

Class times are displayed in browser local time.

Certifications overview

Fundamentals

Gain broad knowledge analyzing logs and metrics with the Fundamentals Certification. Get Sumo Logic up and running and learn to do simple filtering, data parsing, and analysis.

Search Mastery

Build on the knowledge gained in Fundamentals to do more in-depth analysis of logs and metrics. Identify critical events with ease and create the dashboards and alerts necessary to monitor your environment.

Administration

Receive critical Administration expertise on how to set up your organization with Sumo Logic as well as how to optimize and manage queries and content to make the whole team more effective.

Logs for Security

Learn how our Threat Intelligence can help you stay on top of your environment by matching IOCs like IP address, domain names, email addresses, and MD5 hashes. Also learn how to analyze AWS data to monitor account usage and monitor security groups effectively.

Cloud SIEM

Gain expertise in using Sumo Logic Cloud SIEM to transform
ingested data into actionable security insights. Through hands-on practice, you’ll learn how to conduct threat investigations, write and fine-tune detection rules, and create custom insights.

Metrics

Build on your foundational skills with this course focused on metrics analysis in Sumo Logic. Learn to perform deeper analysis using metrics, quickly identify critical events, and create dashboards and alerts to efficiently monitor your Sumo Logic environment and ensure timely insights.

Each certification requires completion of respective Self-Paced or Instructor-Led courses.

Minimum six months hands-on product experience is strongly encouraged prior to certification exam enrollment.

Exams are administered online through Kryterion and are timed with a live proctor. Each attempt requires a new voucher, and retakes can be taken 48 hours after the previous attempt.

Certifications are valid for two years.

Upon passing the exam, a digital credential (Credly badge) will be issued. This is ready for showcasing across social media, your resume and anywhere else you wish!

Refer to our Program FAQ for more details, including details on how to register and exam enrollment requirements.

Questions and inquiries can be directed to training@sumologic.com.

Self-Paced eLearning

Access complimentary, on-demand courses through our online portal!

You’ll find all our certification courses and workshops in a self-paced format that are listed in our brochure, put together using the same high standard as our Instructor Led offerings – ready for you to learn anytime, anywhere, at your own pace.

The self-paced portal is easy to access directly from the Sumo platform. Just go to the Home page, click the Learn tab and then “Learning Hub – Start Here!”

By clicking “Accept All Cookies”, you agree to the storing of cookies on your device to enhance site navigation, analyze site usage, and assist in our marketing efforts. More Information

Your Choices Regarding Cookies on this Site

We use cookies and similar tracking technologies, and we allow our advertising partners to use such technologies, so we can, among other things, show you ads promoting Sumo Logic on other sites and services. These activities may be considered “sales,” “sharing,” or “targeted advertising” under certain privacy laws, and you may have the right to opt out. To opt-out of these activities, uncheck "All cookies" below. Note that you will need to renew this opt-out choice if you visit our website from another device or browser or if you clear your cookies. You can also opt out by visiting our website with a legally-recognized opt-out preference signal, such as the Global Privacy Control.

Manage Consent Preferences

Strictly Necessary Cookies

Always Active

These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

All cookies

  • Performance Cookies
    label

    These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

  • Functional Cookies
    label

    These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

  • Targeting Cookies
    label

    These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
